basics.name: Luiz Rodrigo Martins Barbosa
basics.label: iOS
basics.summary: Software Engineer with leadership and mentoring skills who has broad expertise in a wide variety of technologies, programming languages, platforms, methodologies and good practices. Functional Programming and TDD enthusiast.

work.summary: FinTech that provides a platform to simplify and encourage money savings and investments, through automation and AI tools

highlights: Feature development in the Subscriptions squad, responsible for the most important company KPIs and revenue sources

Extensive contribution to the iOS architecture and code patterns, by leveraging years of SwiftUI, Combine, TCA/Redux, TDD and Functional Programming knowledge to support writing testable, composable and reusable code
Mentoring, fomenting knowledge sharing practices and writing articles (internal and for the company tech blog)

work.summary: British MedTech company that enables hospitals, universities and pharmaceutics to remotely monitor and research patients, throughout SaMD products

highlights: Technical leadership of 11 iOS engineers of different levels, most working from abroad

work.summary: German multinational online food, grocery and goods delivery service

highlights: Code reviews (Swift, Kotlin, Go, Ruby) and architecture review for the native mobile apps and the backend hosted on AWS
Contributions to the iOS platform guild and close collaboration with the iOS and Android staff engineers
RFC/PRD writing and reviewing, feature design, grooming and architecture with the team
Managing a cross-functional team (nine engineers: Android, iOS, backend) responsible for several parts of the Riders app

work.summary: Teufel is a traditional German loudspeaker brand that offers high-quality consumer audio products controllable via apps

highlights: Technical leadership in a team of four, performing code review, pair programming and mentoring for junior and senior developers, as well as hiring, onboarding and tracking the performance, morale and pain-points of the team

Responsible for the architecture of all the new iOS apps, using modern stack and best practices, such as SwiftUI, Combine, redux, pure Functional Programming (full isolation of side-effects and state mutation), TDD, documentation, framework oriented development and app modularity. All these projects were delivered in time, close to zero bugs or crashes

Very close collaboration with management, POs/PMs and UX/UI helping to shape the new products and improving company processes. Technical discussion with several suppliers about complex app and hardware integration
Development of several tools to automate everything that could be automated in our development process
Introduced an open-source mindset to the whole Software team, that allowed the release of many of useful libraries in the company's Github and was also very beneficial when hiring new developers

work.summary: Platform for free, easy and local trades of goods and services that used to belong to eBay

highlights: Maintenance and new features of the eBay Kleinanzeigen iOS app, one of the most popular apps in the country

work.summary: HERE is a map and routing company aimed to provide foundations for autonomous driving and better urban mobility

highlights: iOS CI-as-code (JobDSL, Groovy, Ruby/Rake, Bash) and iOS Development for the HERE WeGo app (Objective-C)
Development of the white-label version for the HERE WeGo app

work.summary: UUX provides network operators with the ultimate Internet-TV-as-a-Service (iTaaS) platform

highlights: Together with the VP of Backend Systems, co-lead the Platforms team, supporting the junior and mid-level developers and improving significantly the processes, project management and development standards

Development and maintenance of media encoder agents, CMS, EPG, video players and several frameworks for Web, Mobile and SmartTV apps (C#, Objective-C, C++, Javascript) such as Telenor MyTV, SKY Online and Telefónica

work.summary: Marketing agency pioneer in loyalty and incentive programs in Brazil

highlights: Maintenance and development of the product Ticket Frete (C#, ASP.NET, Javascript, SOAP and SQL Server)

work.summary: System Integrator focused on advanced technologies solutions and services, Cisco Gold Partner in Brazil

highlights: R&D for dozens of projects, creation of prototypes and MVPs, working closely with management and CEO
Development of products for iPhone, PocketPC, embedded platforms, Cisco IP Phones and routers, as well as backend and web counterparts (C#, Java, Objective-C, C++)
Maintenance and development of the product Liberty Affinity (ASP.NET, SOAP and Oracle)

work.summary: Brazilian company specialized in agricultural and livestock data management software for farm administration

highlights: Technical leadership, team management, mentoring and performance review
CI automation, system analysis and development, agile process improvements
Development of desktop app (VB and SQL developer), PocketPC app (C# .NET Compact Framework) and Palm OS

projects.name: SwiftRex
projects.description: Library that provides Unidirectional Dataflow (redux) for SwiftUI and UIKit, powered by the reactive framework or your choice (Combine, RxSwift, ReactiveSwift)

projects.name: Teufel repositories
projects.description: Useful libraries such as FoundationExtensions, UIExtensions and some Combine wrappers for complex async operations (Bonjour, WAMP, LongPolling, CoreBluetooth, EAP)

projects.name: Personal repositories
projects.description: Useful libraries such as CombineWebSocket, CombineNFC, RungeKutta, FunctionalParser

references.name: Jarbas Brito Segundo
references.reference: Luiz is a great professional, he knows several programming languages​​. He is the main developer behind the development of "batch processing" in our team. In our spare time we talk a lot about arduino, iOS development and software architecture. This guy is flexible to work with any project.
